subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast consecrated thyself to circle round the gathering-place of the holy angels from the Supreme Kingdom! Give thanks, therefore, unto God, thy Lord, for this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من احرم لیطوف بمطاف ملائکه القدس من الفلک الاعلی فاشکرالله ربک علی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places
